sidebar.noConnectionHint: Select a connection to manage queues and topics.

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Manage Azure Service Bus connection profiles. Set one as active to use it for operations.
connections.noConnectionsSubtitle: Add a connection to get started with Service Bus operations.

connectionForm.fieldMaxWaitMsDesc: Context deadline for receive/peek/send calls. Default: 60,000 ms (most ops), 5,000 ms (move initial).
connectionForm.fieldReceiveCountDesc: Messages fetched per batch in Empty and Move operations. Default: 50.
connectionForm.fieldDrainIdleMsDesc: How long Move waits with no messages before finishing. Default: 3,000 ms.
connectionForm.fieldProgressIntervalMsDesc: Throttle interval for progress bar updates during Move. Default: 500 ms (min 50).
connectionForm.fieldBatchSizeDesc: Messages peeked per batch during Search. Default: 50.

worker.details: Operations cannot run because the bundled worker sidecar is missing.

about.title: About Busman
about.author: Author
about.description: A desktop tool for managing Azure Service Bus queues and topics.

updater.availableMessage: Busman {{version}} is available. Do you want to download and install it now?
updater.installedMessage: The update was installed successfully. Please restart Busman to finish applying it.
updater.portableAvailableMessage: Busman {{version}} is available. To update, download the latest portable version from the GitHub releases page.

toolbar.confirmReceive: This will permanently remove all messages from "{{entity}}" (mode: {{mode}}). This cannot be undone.
toolbar.confirmReplay: This will move all DLQ messages from "{{entity}}" back to the main queue. Continue?
toolbar.sendTitle: Send a message to this entity
toolbar.receiveQueuesOnly: Receive is only supported for queues
toolbar.replayQueuesOnly: Replay is only supported for queues
toolbar.replayTitle: Move DLQ messages back to the main queue
toolbar.moveTitle: Move all messages to another queue
toolbar.moveQueuesOnly: Move is only supported for queues

sidebar.selectConnection: Select a connection to browse entities.

properties.clickToInspect: Click a row to inspect the message.
properties.subject: Subject

grid.emptySelectEntity: Select an entity from the sidebar, then click Browse.
grid.emptyNoBrowse: Click Browse to load and preview messages before receiving or replaying.
grid.emptyNoMessages: No messages found. This queue appears to be empty.
grid.emptyNoMatch: No messages match the current filters.

moveModal.title: Move Messages
moveModal.warning: This operation consumes and removes all messages from the source queue. It cannot be undone.
moveModal.errorGeneric: Move failed. Check the Event Log for details.
moveModal.errorSameQueue: Source and destination must be different.

connectionsModal.title: Manage Connections
connectionsModal.noConnections: No connections yet. Add one to get started.
connectionsModal.name: Name
connectionsModal.required: Name and Connection String are required.
